list.title: Article catalogue

barcodeModal.title: Add a barcode
barcodeModal.help: Use this quick action to prepare an article for sale and scanning without leaving the catalogue.
barcodeModal.empty: No barcode loaded for this article.

labelModal.title: Prepare a label batch
labelModal.help: This creates a label batch linked to the article for printing and tracking.
labelModal.empty: No label batch loaded for this article.

priceModal.title: Add a price
priceModal.help: Quickly add a standard, promotional or contract price without leaving the article list.
priceModal.empty: No price loaded for this article.

messages.barcodeCreationFailed: Barcode creation failed. Check uniqueness and the entered fields.
messages.barcodeGenerationFailed: Automatic generation failed. Check that no active primary barcode already exists.
messages.labelQuantityPositive: The label quantity must be greater than zero.
messages.labelBatchFailed: The label batch could not be prepared.
messages.priceAndStartDateRequired: Amount and start date are required.
